label: The 32-pad grid
short: 32 velocity-sensitive RGB pads (4×8). Meaning depends on the current view.

views.Note View (synth/MIDI): Top two rows = 16 pattern steps; bottom two rows = in-scale keyboard (pad 32 = pad 17's pitch).
views.Note View (drums): Top two rows = steps; lower pads = the 64-sample bank.
views.Mixer View: Row 1 = mutes; rows 3–4 = the 16 Scene pads.
views.Scales View: Bottom rows = 16 scales; top rows = root note.

label: Macros 1–8
short: Eight endless encoders with RGB LEDs; moves record as automation when Record is lit.

views.Synth Note View: Patch parameters (up to 4 per knob, patch-defined).
views.Drum Note View: Even knobs only: 2 Pitch, 4 Decay, 6 Distortion, 8 EQ.
views.FX View: Per-track reverb sends (cream) or delay sends (peach).

label: Master Filter
short: Whole-mix DJ filter, always active. Centre detent = off; left = low-pass, right = high-pass.

label: Master Volume
short: Overall analogue output level — separate from mixer track levels.

label: Track buttons ×8
short: Synth 1 (violet), Synth 2 (pale green), MIDI 1 (blue), MIDI 2 (pink), Drums 1–4 (orange/yellow/purple/aqua). Pressing one always opens that track's Note View.

label: Note
short: Note View — pattern steps + playing surface for the current track.
shift: Shift + Note = Expanded Note View (4-octave keyboard) / Expanded Drum View (pads 29–32 play all four drums).

label: Velocity
short: Per-step velocity editing on a 16-pad meter (8 units per pad).

label: Gate
short: Per-step note length: 1/6 to 16 steps in sixths. Drums: micro-hit toggles for ratchets.
shift: Shift + Gate (or press again) = Micro Step View — 6 sub-positions per step; pad 24 = tie-forward (drones).

label: Pattern Settings
short: Start/end points (any length 1–32), play order (forward/reverse/ping-pong/random), per-track sync rate.
shift: Shift + Pattern Settings (or press again) = Probability View (8 levels, 100%–12.5%).

label: Scales
short: 16 scales + root selection. One key per project, shared by synth AND MIDI tracks. Non-destructive to change, even while playing.

label: Preset
short: Patches (synths, 128 in 4 pages), samples (drums, 64), or templates (MIDI, 8) for the current track.
shift: Shift + patch pad = select silently (no preview).

label: Step Page (1-16/17-32)
short: Extends a pattern from 16 to 32 steps; at 32, the legend shows which half is displayed (blue = 1–16, orange = 17–32). Clear + Step Page returns to 16.
shift: Clear + Step Page = back to 16 (keeps 17–32 data) · Duplicate + Step Page = extend to 32 copying 1–16.

label: Patterns
short: 8 pattern slots per track (2 pages). Tap = queued switch; chains: hold lowest + press highest (contiguous, max 256 steps).
shift: Shift + Patterns = View Lock · Shift + pattern pad = instant switch.

label: Mixer
short: 8-channel mixer: levels/pan on macros, row-1 mutes (no solo), Scene pads on the lower rows. The live cockpit.
shift: Shift + Scene pad (in Mixer View) = assign scene.

label: FX
short: One global delay (16 BPM-synced presets) + one reverb (8 presets); per-track sends on the macros.
shift: Shift + FX = Side Chain View (7 presets per synth/input, key drum selectable).

label: ▼ / ▲ arrows
short: Octave shift in Note View (+5/−6 per track); page selector in Patterns/Mixer/Side Chain views.
shift: Shift + ▼/▲ = transpose the whole pattern by octave (red = at range limit).

label: Tempo/Swing
short: Tempo View: Macro 1 = BPM (40–240), Macro 2 = swing (20–80, default 50), Macro 5 = click level. Long-press to peek.
shift: Shift + tap Tempo/Swing ×3+ = tap tempo (averages last 5).

label: Record
short: Live-record notes and knob automation. Hold >½ s for momentary punch-in/out.
shift: Shift + Record = Rec Quantise on/off (green = quantised).

label: Play
short: Start/stop toggle. From stopped, always restarts at step 1 (or the Start Point).
shift: Shift + Play = continue from where you stopped.

label: Clear
short: Hold + step = wipe the step. Hold + turn macro ≥20% = erase that knob's automation. Instant and permanent — no undo.
shift: Shift + Clear = click on/off. At power-on: force-load a blank project.

label: Duplicate
short: Hold + source + destination = copy steps/patterns with all attributes (synth↔synth, synth↔MIDI, drum↔drum only).
shift: Shift + Duplicate = Mutate — reshuffles the playing pattern. No undo; duplicate first.

label: Save
short: Press twice to save (first press = choose slot/colour with Macro 1; any other button aborts). Nothing ever autosaves.
shift: Shift + Save = Setup View. At power-on: Save Lock on/off.

label: Projects
short: 64 project slots. Tap = queued load while playing (Shift = instant). Loaded-while-playing keeps the current tempo.

label: Shift
short: The second hat on every button. Sticky Shift (enable in Setup View) makes it latch for one-handed use.
